title: Root Canal Treatment - Molar
description: Complex endodontic case involving a lower molar with curved roots and calcified canals. Treatment involved careful navigation and complete obturation.

title: Complete Ceramic Crown
description: Full-mouth rehabilitation with ceramic crowns on anterior and posterior teeth. Excellent esthetics and functionality achieved.

title: Wisdom Tooth Extraction
description: Surgical extraction of impacted lower third molar with significant bone removal required.

title: Pediatric Primary Molar Treatment
description: Pulpotomy of primary molar in child patient with excellent results.

title: Anterior Composite Veneer
description: Direct composite veneer on anterior tooth for shade and shape correction.
